description_long: This is a modern, low-profile wooden media console or sideboard with a rectangular shape and clean, minimalist lines. The front features a combination of open shelving on the left, a white sliding or fixed panel in the center, and a wooden door or panel on the right, all elevated on slim, black metal legs. The top, sides, and back are finished in a light wood veneer, giving it a natural and contemporary appearance. The open shelves are divided into compartments, suitable for storing electronics or decorative items. The overall design is sleek and functional, with no visible handles, emphasizing a streamlined aesthetic. This piece would fit well in urban living rooms, lobbies, or office waiting areas.
description: A modern, low-profile wooden media console with open shelves, a white panel, and a wooden door, elevated on black metal legs. Its minimalist design features light wood surfaces and clean lines.
description_view_0: The end view shows a plain, rectangular light wood panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: The front view displays open shelving on the left, a white panel in the center, and a wooden door or panel on the right, all above black metal legs.
description_view_2: The opposite end view mirrors view 0, showing a plain, light wood side with no openings or features.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals a continuous light wood surface with no visible openings, panels, or hardware.
